title: catapodium halleri var. tenuiculum
intro: Catapodium halleri var. tenuiculum, also known as a subspecies of Catapodium, is a low-growing, perennial plant with a slender stem and narrow leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Catapodium halleri var. tenuiculum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe wounds, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. It can be prepared as an infusion or a tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to make salves and ointments.
